name: Wave
description: Wave is a free accounting and invoicing platform for small businesses. It provides a GraphQL API to manage customers, invoices, products, and accounting data. Perfect for automating bookkeeping, sending invoices, and tracking business finances.

capabilities.name: list_businesses
capabilities.description: Retrieve all businesses associated with the authenticated user's Wave account.

capabilities.name: list_customers
capabilities.description: List all customers for a specific business, including their contact details and outstanding balances.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record for a business with name, email, address, and other contact information.

capabilities.name: create_invoice
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a customer with line items, due date, and memo. The invoice can be saved as draft or sent immediately.

capabilities.name: list_invoices
capabilities.description: Retrieve all invoices for a business, with optional filtering by status such as draft, sent, paid, or overdue.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: List all products and services defined for a business, including prices and descriptions.

capabilities.name: create_product
capabilities.description: Create a new product or service entry for a business with name, price, and optional description.

capabilities.name: list_accounts
capabilities.description: Retrieve the chart of accounts for a business, showing all income, expense, asset, and liability accounts.
